fld_description: Sample grain: 'unpooled' (single net tow with full position) or 'pooled' (per-cruise regional composite of n_tows_pooled night tows).
Original ZooDB cruise label (e.g. 'CALCOFI 5103', 'CALCOFI Monterey 5105', 'CALCOFI 1203SH'); cruise_key is derived from it.
Vessel name as provided (unpooled only; 'N/A' for pooled); resolved to ship_key against the NODC ship registry.
Tow start date-time (unpooled only); cross-dataset match key to casts. Timezone unconfirmed (assumed local ship time, see questions).
ZooDB region: SC (Southern California, lines 76.7-93), CC (Central California, lines 60-70), or Other (outside standard regions).
Latitude in decimal degrees, WGS84 (EPSG:4326); unpooled only.
Longitude in decimal degrees, WGS84 (EPSG:4326); unpooled only.
Maximum tow depth in meters (unpooled only); CalCOFI standard 0-210 m since 1969, 0-140 m 1951-1968.
Minimum tow depth in meters (unpooled only).
Net gear: CAL1MOBL (1-m ring net, to 1977), CALBOBL (0.71-m bongo, since Dec 1977), or '1 m' (unpooled only).
Number of tows aggregated: 1 for unpooled, n for pooled composites.
Lower-cased underscore join key derived from the ZooDB higher-taxon label; FK target from zoodb_measurement.
Pivoted to long form: zooplankton_abundance (count/1000m3), zooplankton_abundance_areal (count/m2), and zooplankton_biomass_carbon (mg C/m2).
